\title{Citation Test Article}
\authorsnames{Jane Doe}
\authorsaffiliations{{Test University}}
\abstract{A test article with citations.}
\keywords{test}
\volume{1}
\pubnumber{1}
\pubyear{2025}
\firstpage{1}
\doi{10.0000/test}

\addbibresource{bibliography.bib}

\begin{document}
\maketitle

\section{Introduction}
This is a test with a single-author citation \cite{smith2020test}
and a two-author citation \cite{jones2021multi}
and a three-plus-author citation \cite{team2022three}
and a grouped citation \cite{smith2020test,jones2021multi,team2022three}.

\section{Citation optional arguments}
Postnote only: \parencite[p.~42]{smith2020test}.
Prenote and postnote: \parencite[cf.][p.~42]{smith2020test}.
Textcite postnote: \textcite[p.~42]{jones2021multi}.
Textcite prenote and postnote: \textcite[see][p.~99]{team2022three}.
Citeyear postnote: \citeyear[p.~42]{smith2020test}.
No optional args: \parencite{jones2021multi}.
Autocite postnote: \autocite[p.~7]{team2022three}.

\printbibliography

\end{document}
